title: Buttonz
description: Adds utility shortcuts to the left side of your inventory screen.
body:
# Buttons
Buttons is a mod that adds utility shortcuts to the left side of your inventory screen. These buttons will be displayed when any container (Chest, Furnace, etc) is open. Similar to the old buttons from NEI at the top left of the screen.

Some of the available buttons:
- Gamemode changing
- Weather changing
- Time changing
- Item deletion
- Healing/Hunger filling

A brief video showcasing some of the features can be found [here](https://streamable.com/w16n). It is somewhat old, but gets the point across.

---

**Note: Textures are currently very work in progress. I am not an artist and my artist is AWOL.**

Buttons is focused on providing stability, performance, and ease of use.

An API is provided so that other mods may add utilities themselves.

## Archival notice
**This mod is abandoned and has been uploaded for archival purposes. It was [originally created](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/buttonz) by [TehNut](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/TehNut/projects) on Nov 9, 2016. It has been uploaded to Modrinth under the ModrinthArchives account with permission from the original author.**

![Discord screenshot showing permission to upload](https://cdn.modrinth.com/archives/tehnut-permission.png)
